samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="PIPELINE_STAGES" value="3">Number of pipeline stages in the adder.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="i_en_reg" description="Register to store the input enable signal for the pipeline stages."></reg>
            <reg id="adda_reg" width_description="[63:0]" description="Register to store the input operand A for the pipeline stages."></reg>
            <reg id="addb_reg" width_description="[63:0]" description="Register to store the input operand B for the pipeline stages."></reg>
            <reg id="sum_reg" width_description="[64:0]" description="Register to store the sum result for the pipeline stages."></reg>
            <reg id="o_en_reg" description="Register to store the output enable signal for the pipeline stages."></reg>
            <always description="Sequential logic to control the pipeline stages.">
                <if description="Reset the registers on the active low reset signal.">
                    <condition><equal><id>rst_n</id><value>0</value></equal></condition>
                    <then>
                        <assign><id>i_en_reg</id><value>0</value></assign>
                        <assign><id>adda_reg</id><value>[63:0] 0</value></assign>
                        <assign><id>addb_reg</id><value>[63:0] 0</value></assign>
                        <assign><id>sum_reg</id><value>[64:0] 0</value></assign>
                        <assign><id>o_en_reg</id><value>0</value></assign>
                    </then>
                </if>
                <else description="Update the registers based on the input enable signal and the pipeline stages.">
                    <condition><equal><id>i_en</id><value>1</value></equal></condition>
                    <then>
                        <assign><id>i_en_reg</id><value>1</value></assign>
                        <assign><id>adda_reg</id><value><id>adda_reg</id><shift_right><value>1</value></shift_right></assign>
                        <assign><id>addb_reg</id><value><id>addb_reg</id><shift_right><value>1</value></shift_right></assign>
                        <assign><id>sum_reg</id><value><id>sum_reg</id><shift_right><value>1</value></shift_right></assign>
                        <assign><id>o_en_reg</id><value>1</value></assign>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <assign><id>i_en_reg</id><value>0</value></assign>
                        <assign><id>o_en_reg</id><value>0</value></assign>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </always>
            <always description="Calculate the sum result for the pipeline stages.">
                <condition><equal><id>i_en_reg</id><value>1</value></equal></condition>
                <then>
                    <assign><id>sum_reg</id><value><id>adda_reg</id> <id>addb_reg</id> <id>sum_reg</id></value></assign>
                </then>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <assign><id>result</id><value><id>sum_reg</id></value></assign>
        <assign><id>o_en</id><value><id>o_en_reg</id></value></assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
